nodes.context: Transnational criminal organization of associated gangs, originating in Los Angeles, active in the Americas and Europe.
Mexican drug cartel that recruited and trained MS-13 members.
Armed wing of the Cartel del Golfo, opposed by MS-13 on the US-Mexico border.
Mexican drug cartel whose armed wing was Los Zetas.
Rival gang to MS-13, also originating in Los Angeles.

edges.evidence_quote: un esempio fu il Cartello di Sinaloa , guidato da Joaquin Guzman Loera , che ne addestrò diversi all'uso di armi e li dispiegò sulla frontiera fra USA e Messico per contrastare i Los Zetas
edges.context: Cartello di Sinaloa recruited and trained MS-13 members to fight Los Zetas.

edges.evidence_quote: li dispiegò sulla frontiera fra USA e Messico per contrastare i Los Zetas
edges.context: MS-13 members were deployed by Sinaloa to fight against Los Zetas.

edges.evidence_quote: una delle bande rivali, la 18th Street Gang , sia nata nella 18th Street
edges.context: 18th Street Gang is mentioned as a rival gang to MS-13.
